method: latest 50k public maps; threshold median = median target_networth_diff among eventual winners that were trailing (target_diff < 0) at minute; STAR classification at WR60 with late_signal_gate_enabled=False; late_all grouped by avg_wr=nearest((late_wr+all_wr)/2); normalization enforces minute N+1 <= minute N and WR+5 <= WR for WR60-100.
